plan.reasoning: With 21 incoming damage, I prioritize blocking as much as possible to preserve HP. Venerate+ generates 3 stars. I use 1 star for Cloak of Stars to gain 7 Block, leaving 2 stars. Defend adds 5 more Block, and Plating provides 3, totaling 15 Block against 21 damage. Omnislice deals a bit of free damage. Astral Pulse is held because playing it would consume all stars and prevent playing Cloak of Stars.
